research.goalTemplate: Research {what}. Read README.md and any upstream source files needed to understand the current project shape. IMPORTANT: write your findings to the single file ./research.md at the root of your working directory — exactly that path, not a subdirectory and not a different filename. Include concise findings, constraints, and the intended implementation approach.

execute.goalTemplate: Implement {what}. Read ./research.md and upstream source files before editing. IMPORTANT: create the single file ./feature-builder.mjs at the root of your working directory — exactly that path, not a subdirectory and not a different filename. It must export function buildFeatureName(input) that trims input, lowercases it, replaces non-alphanumeric runs with single hyphens, and removes leading or trailing hyphens.

review.goalTemplate: Review {what}. Read ./research.md, ./feature-builder.mjs, and upstream source files relevant to the implementation. IMPORTANT: write your review to the single file ./review.md at the root of your working directory — exactly that path, not a subdirectory and not a different filename. Include verdict, risks, and whether acceptance should pass.
